channel.title: Software-Engineering on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Software-Engineering on Junho Lee

item.title: DataNexus Architecture: Four Layers and Two Flows
item.description: Why ontology-based routing instead of a single NL2SQL pipeline — and what the second flow, from Pull to Push, looks like

item.title: 9. BIRD 56%: Nine Experiments and What Got Ruled Out
item.description: I hit 80% on my own 30-question benchmark, but only 56% on BIRD Mini-Dev’s 50 public questions. Nine experiments later, I had ruled out the multi-candidate hypothesis from three different angles. What’s left is schema understanding and methodology.

item.title: 3. On-Site GEO Technical Architecture - From Product DB to JSON-LD
item.description: How product master DB data flows through a 3-stage pipeline to become JSON-LD in your HTML <head>. Covers the pipeline architecture and SSR-based automated deployment.
